repair_actions.details: Add explicit acknowledgment that 4 of 14 opened papers (HER2 MAP P001, Frontiers HER2 MRI P002, Roche Navify P004, MuPD P010) lack PDF access and are shallow. This covers ~29% of the opened literature. Add a brief note in Section 4.1 or at the start of Section 4.

Integrate ShaSpec Deep Evidence and HistDiST Deep Evidence content thematically into Themes 2 and 3 rather than presenting them as standalone catalog sections. The catalog format preserves evidence but creates structural redundancy and delays thematic synthesis by 280+ lines.

Consolidate multiple verbatim repetitions: (a) BCI dataset's 37.5-40% pathologist accuracy appears in 6+ sections — cite once fully in Section 3, reference thereafter; (b) HistDiST clinical caveat appears verbatim in 3+ locations — cite once in Theme 3, reference in Risks; (c) BCI dataset study appears in 7+ locations — consolidate citations.

For Gap 1: explain why pathologist acceptance is harder than algorithmic benchmarking (pixel-level vs. diagnostic-relevant morphological features). For Gap 4: explain why end-to-end joint training is technically difficult (gradient alignment, dataset size, training instability). For Gap 5: contextualize the 0.84pp gap (95.09% vs. 94.25%) in patient-level clinical consequence.
